passphrase.mode_setup_text: Choose a passphrase. You will need it every time you launch banterchat. There is no recovery if you forget it.
passphrase.hint_setup: Your passphrase encrypts your session locally. We never see it.
passphrase.hint_unlock: Forgot it? Reset to log in fresh.
passphrase.err_too_short: Passphrase must be at least 8 characters.
passphrase.confirm_reset: This deletes your saved session. You will need to log in again. Continue?

settings.heading: Desktop Settings
settings.subheading: Settings that only apply to the desktop app
settings.section_language_desc: The language used by the desktop client's own UI
settings.label_close_to_tray: Close to tray instead of quitting
